name: JoAi: Set Contract Address

description.en: Store the on-chain address for a deployed smart contract so your agent can interact with it.
description.de: Speichere die On-Chain-Adresse für einen deployten Smart Contract, damit dein Agent damit interagieren kann.
description.es: Store the on-chain address for a deployed smart contract so your agent can interact with it.
description.fr: Store the on-chain address for a deployed smart contract so your agent can interact with it.
description.ro: Store the on-chain address for a deployed smart contract so your agent can interact with it.
description.it: Store the on-chain address for a deployed smart contract so your agent can interact with it.

bot: Use this after a contract has been deployed to record its on-chain address. Ask for the contract ID, address, and network.

inputs.name: Contract ID
inputs.bot: The contract hash ID. If the user refers to a contract by name, list contracts first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Address
inputs.bot: The deployed contract address on the blockchain (e.g., erd1... for MultiversX, 0x... for EVM).

inputs.name: Network

description.en: The network this address is on
description.de: Das Netzwerk, auf dem sich diese Adresse befindet
description.es: The network this address is on
description.fr: The network this address is on
description.ro: The network this address is on
description.it: The network this address is on

inputs.bot: The network where this address was deployed (e.g., devnet or mainnet).
